steps.title: Identify the subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Step 1: The main subject is “Maya Angelou,” a singular noun. The phrase “along with others” adds additional people but does not change the subject from singular to plural.

steps.title: Choose the correct verb form
steps.content:
Step 2: The correct verb must agree with the singular subject.

Choice A, “is,” matches the singular present-tense verb needed for “Maya Angelou.” The other choices either use plural verbs (B and C) or a plural past-participle form (D), which disagree with the singular subject.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
